effect.subject: accent colors (Green, Dark Gray, Silver)
effect.reserved_for: Green: CTA fills and small accents; Dark Gray: charts/secondary UI only; Silver: never text

rule_text: [BASELINE] Never set body copy in Purple or Green; reserve Green for CTA fills and small accents; Dark Gray for charts/secondary UI only; never use Silver for text.
intent: Constrain accent colors to their reserved roles.
summary: Avoid Purple/Green for body text; Green only for CTAs/accents; Dark Gray for charts/secondary UI; Silver not for text.
